Files

tai/env/
os.rs

1// Phase 3: OS/distro detection
2
3use std::process::Command;
4
5pub struct OsInfo {
6    pub os: String,
7    pub os_version: Option<String>,
8    pub os_family: Option<String>,
9    pub kernel: Option<String>,
10}
11
12/// Parse /etc/os-release content to extract ID, VERSION_ID, and ID_LIKE.
13pub fn parse_os_release(content: &str) -> (String, Option<String>, Option<String>) {
14    let mut id = None;
15    let mut version_id = None;
16    let mut id_like = None;
17
18    for line in content.lines() {
19        let line = line.trim();
20        if let Some((key, value)) = line.split_once('=') {
21            let value = value.trim_matches('"').trim_matches('\'');
22            match key {
23                "ID" => id = Some(value.to_string()),
24                "VERSION_ID" => version_id = Some(value.to_string()),
25                "ID_LIKE" => id_like = Some(value.to_string()),
26                _ => {}
27            }
28        }
29    }
30
31    (
32        id.unwrap_or_else(|| "linux".to_string()),
33        version_id,
34        id_like,
35    )
36}
37
38/// Extract kernel version from /proc/version content.
39pub fn parse_proc_version(content: &str) -> Option<String> {
40    // Format: "Linux version 5.15.0-generic ..."
41    let parts: Vec<&str> = content.split_whitespace().collect();
42    if parts.len() >= 3 && parts[0] == "Linux" && parts[1] == "version" {
43        Some(parts[2].to_string())
44    } else {
45        None
46    }
47}
48
49pub fn detect() -> OsInfo {
50    if cfg!(target_os = "linux") {
51        detect_linux()
52    } else if cfg!(target_os = "macos") {
53        detect_macos()
54    } else {
55        OsInfo {
56            os: std::env::consts::OS.to_string(),
57            os_version: None,
58            os_family: None,
59            kernel: None,
60        }
61    }
62}
63
64fn detect_linux() -> OsInfo {
65    let (os, os_version, os_family) = match std::fs::read_to_string("/etc/os-release") {
66        Ok(content) => parse_os_release(&content),
67        Err(_) => ("linux".to_string(), None, None),
68    };
69
70    let kernel = std::fs::read_to_string("/proc/version")
71        .ok()
72        .and_then(|content| parse_proc_version(&content))
73        .or_else(|| {
74            Command::new("uname")
75                .arg("-r")
76                .output()
77                .ok()
78                .and_then(|o| {
79                    if o.status.success() {
80                        Some(String::from_utf8_lossy(&o.stdout).trim().to_string())
81                    } else {
82                        None
83                    }
84                })
85        });
86
87    OsInfo {
88        os,
89        os_version,
90        os_family,
91        kernel,
92    }
93}
94
95fn detect_macos() -> OsInfo {
96    let os_version = Command::new("sw_vers")
97        .arg("-productVersion")
98        .output()
99        .ok()
100        .and_then(|o| {
101            if o.status.success() {
102                Some(String::from_utf8_lossy(&o.stdout).trim().to_string())
103            } else {
104                None
105            }
106        });
107
108    let kernel = Command::new("uname")
109        .arg("-r")
110        .output()
111        .ok()
112        .and_then(|o| {
113            if o.status.success() {
114                Some(String::from_utf8_lossy(&o.stdout).trim().to_string())
115            } else {
116                None
117            }
118        });
119
120    OsInfo {
121        os: "macos".to_string(),
122        os_version,
123        os_family: None,
124        kernel,
125    }
126}
127
128#[cfg(test)]
129mod tests {
130    use super::*;
131
132    #[test]
133    fn parse_ubuntu_os_release() {
134        let content = r#"NAME="Ubuntu"
135VERSION="22.04.3 LTS (Jammy Jellyfish)"
136ID=ubuntu
137ID_LIKE=debian
138VERSION_ID="22.04"
139"#;
140        let (os, version, family) = parse_os_release(content);
141        assert_eq!(os, "ubuntu");
142        assert_eq!(version, Some("22.04".to_string()));
143        assert_eq!(family, Some("debian".to_string()));
144    }
145
146    #[test]
147    fn parse_arch_os_release() {
148        let content = r#"NAME="Arch Linux"
149ID=arch
150ID_LIKE=archlinux
151"#;
152        let (os, version, family) = parse_os_release(content);
153        assert_eq!(os, "arch");
154        assert_eq!(version, None);
155        assert_eq!(family, Some("archlinux".to_string()));
156    }
157
158    #[test]
159    fn parse_alpine_os_release() {
160        let content = r#"NAME="Alpine Linux"
161ID=alpine
162VERSION_ID=3.18.4
163"#;
164        let (os, version, family) = parse_os_release(content);
165        assert_eq!(os, "alpine");
166        assert_eq!(version, Some("3.18.4".to_string()));
167        assert_eq!(family, None);
168    }
169
170    #[test]
171    fn parse_nixos_os_release() {
172        let content = r#"NAME=NixOS
173ID=nixos
174VERSION="23.11 (Tapir)"
175VERSION_ID="23.11"
176ID_LIKE="nixos"
177"#;
178        let (os, version, family) = parse_os_release(content);
179        assert_eq!(os, "nixos");
180        assert_eq!(version, Some("23.11".to_string()));
181        assert_eq!(family, Some("nixos".to_string()));
182    }
183
184    #[test]
185    fn parse_empty_os_release() {
186        let (os, version, family) = parse_os_release("");
187        assert_eq!(os, "linux");
188        assert_eq!(version, None);
189        assert_eq!(family, None);
190    }
191
192    #[test]
193    fn parse_proc_version_typical() {
194        let content = "Linux version 5.15.0-91-generic (buildd@bos03-amd64-016) (gcc (Ubuntu 11.4.0-1ubuntu1~22.04) 11.4.0, GNU ld (GNU Binutils for Ubuntu) 2.38) #101-Ubuntu SMP";
195        let kernel = parse_proc_version(content);
196        assert_eq!(kernel, Some("5.15.0-91-generic".to_string()));
197    }
198
199    #[test]
200    fn parse_proc_version_empty() {
201        assert_eq!(parse_proc_version(""), None);
202    }
203
204    #[test]
205    fn parse_proc_version_garbage() {
206        assert_eq!(parse_proc_version("not a valid proc version"), None);
207    }
208
209    #[test]
210    fn detect_returns_something() {
211        let info = detect();
212        assert!(!info.os.is_empty());
213    }
214}
